name: Design System — Shared Components
diagram_source:
graph TD
  CurrencyInput --> FR-016
  CurrencyInput --> FR-023

elements.name: CurrencyInput
elements.description: Shared composable for monetary input with decimal scaling and bold formatting. Embeds inline AmountCalculator.

elements.name: AmountCalculator
elements.description: Transient inline bottom sheet or dialog calculator providing basic math (+, -, *, /, %) with an explicit save mechanism.

elements.name: IconPicker
elements.description: Visual grid-based picker for category and account icons

elements.name: NormalizedInputStyle
elements.description: Project-wide standard for OutlinedTextFields using MaterialTheme.shapes.large for a rounded, premium feel.
